title: BEM-545 wire live Telegram hourly sender
objective:
Run script:
"""
workflows = Path('.github/workflows')
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

hourly = workflows / 'curator-hourly-report.yml'
sender_wf = workflows / 'telegram-outbox-sender.yml'
report = reports / 'bem545_live_telegram_hourly_sender_wiring.md'
proof = proofs / 'bem545_wire_live_telegram_hourly_sender.txt'

hourly_exists = hourly.exists()
sender_exists = sender_wf.exists()
if hourly_exists:
    original = hourly.read_text(errors='ignore')
else:
    original = ''

# Safety: do not create new schedule exception. Only edit approved curator-hourly-report.yml.
# If file exists, append sender steps after checkout/report generation if not present already.
text = original
if hourly_exists:
    if 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN' not in text and 'telegram_outbox_pick.py' not in text:
        marker = '      - name: Commit report changes'
        insert = '''      - name: Pick queued Telegram message\n        continue-on-error: true\n        run: python3 scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py\n\n      - name: Send queued Telegram message\n        continue-on-error: true\n        env:\n          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}\n          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}\n          TELEGRAM_DRY_RUN: "false"\n        run: |\n          python3 - <<PY\n          import json\n          from pathlib import Path\n          pick = json.loads(Path("governance/tmp/telegram_pick.json").read_text())\n          Path("governance/tmp/message.txt").write_text(pick.get("message", ""), encoding="utf-8")\n          PY\n          if [ -z "${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}" ] || [ -z "${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" ]; then\n            echo "missing_runtime_secret" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt\n          else\n            MSG=$(cat governance/tmp/message.txt)\n            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/telegram_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text=${MSG}" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")\n            if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" = "200" ]; then echo "sent" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt; else echo "telegram_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt; fi\n          fi\n\n      - name: Record Telegram delivery result\n        continue-on-error: true\n        run: python3 scripts/telegram_delivery_record.py\n\n'''
        if marker in text:
            text = text.replace(marker, insert + marker, 1)
        else:
            text = text + '\n' + insert
    hourly.write_text(text)

checks = {
  'curator_hourly_exists': hourly_exists,
  'sender_workflow_exists': sender_exists,
  'hourly_has_schedule': 'schedule:' in text,
  'hourly_has_cron': '0 * * * *' in text,
  'hourly_has_continue_on_error': 'continue-on-error: true' in text,
  'hourly_uses_token_secret': 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN' in text,
  'hourly_uses_chat_secret': 'TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID' in text,
  'hourly_calls_picker': 'telegram_outbox_pick.py' in text,
  'hourly_calls_recorder': 'telegram_delivery_record.py' in text,
  'no_issue_31': '#31' not in text and 'issue_number: 31' not in text
}
ok = all(checks.values())

status = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
status['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:38 (UTC+3)'
status['telegram_live_sender'] = {
  'operator_screenshot': 'secrets_present_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID',
  'hourly_workflow': '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
  'sender_scripts': ['scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py','scripts/telegram_delivery_record.py'],
  'status': 'wired_to_hourly_schedule' if ok else 'wiring_blocked',
  'checks': checks,
  'blocker': None if ok else {'code':'TELEGRAM_HOURLY_WIRING_FAILED','checks':checks}
}
status['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'TELEGRAM_HOURLY_WIRING_FAILED','checks':checks}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(status, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

record = {
  'record_type':'telegram_live_sender_wiring',
  'cycle_id':'bem545-live-telegram-hourly-sender',
  'source':'gpt',
  'status':'completed' if ok else 'failed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/reports/bem545_live_telegram_hourly_sender_wiring.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None if ok else {'code':'TELEGRAM_HOURLY_WIRING_FAILED','checks':checks},
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:38 (UTC+3)',
  'checks':checks
}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report.write_text('# BEM-545 | Live Telegram Hourly Sender Wiring | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:38 (UTC+3)\n\n## Исправление\nОператор показал, что `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` и `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` уже существуют в GitHub Secrets. Добавлять их заново не нужно.\n\n## Что сделано\n- Live sender подключён к разрешённому `.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml`.\n- Workflow использует runtime secrets `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` и `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID`.\n- Sender пишет `telegram_delivery_result` в `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Что остаётся\nLive PASS появится после ближайшего запуска `curator-hourly-report.yml` или ручного `workflow_dispatch`: в transport должна появиться запись `telegram_delivery_result.status=sent`.\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(record['blocker'], ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-545 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': live Telegram sender wired to curator-hourly-report.yml using existing secrets names.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(hourly), str(state_path), str(transport), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-545 wired live Telegram sender to approved hourly workflow using existing secrets names')
"""
No issue comments.
